title: Citrusy Gooey Portuguese Fish Soup
description: A bright, citrus-infused Portuguese fish soup with a velvety texture, featuring a fragrant tadka of cumin and mustard seeds.
instructions: Heat 1 tsp of the olive oil in a small pan over medium heat. Add cumin and mustard seeds and let them splutter for about 10 seconds.
Transfer the tadka to a large soup pot.
In the same pot, add the remaining olive oil and sauté the chopped onion until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and smoked paprika; cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in the white wine to deglaze the pot, scraping up any browned bits, and reduce by half, about 3 minutes.
Add the fish stock and bring to a gentle simmer.
Stir in the lemon zest and juices, lime juice, and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Add the cod cubes and simmer for 4-5 minutes until the fish just cooks through.
Add the shrimp and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until pink.
Taste and adjust seasoning if needed, then serve hot, optionally garnished with fresh herbs.
